# Local Search Ally — AI-Readable Overview

> Last updated: 2026-05-11

## About

**Local Search Ally** is a one-person local SEO and web development service based in Siloam Springs, Arkansas. Founded and operated by Chad Smith.

- **Website:** https://www.localsearchally.com
- **Audit tool:** https://audit.localsearchally.com
- **Email:** chad@localsearchally.com
- **Phone:** +1 (479) 380-8626
- **Location:** Siloam Springs, AR 72761

## What We Do

Local Search Ally helps home service trade businesses in Northwest Arkansas get found on Google and rank in the Map Pack. There are two ways to work together: a self-serve audit and tracking platform for owner-operators who want to run their own local SEO, and a done-for-you managed service for contractors who want Chad to handle it. All plans are month-to-month with no long-term contracts.

## Services

### DIY Pro — Self-Serve Local SEO Platform
- Full local SEO audit dashboard (GBP, reviews, citations, backlinks, on-page, technical, AI visibility)
- Geo-grid rank tracking across your service area
- Google Business Profile audit and monitoring
- Citation tracking across top directories
- AI visibility check (ChatGPT, Perplexity, Google AI)
- 8 pro local SEO tools in one dashboard
- Monthly report in plain English
- 14-day free trial, no card required
- **Price:** $49/month

### Multi-Location — For 2–10 Locations or Agencies
- Everything in DIY Pro
- Up to 10 location profiles under one account
- Cross-location rank comparison
- Consolidated reporting across all locations
- Priority support
- 14-day free trial, no card required
- **Price:** $199/month

### Done-for-You — Managed Local SEO
- Full Google Business Profile audit, optimization, and ongoing management
- Citation cleanup across top 15 directories (NAP consistency)
- On-page SEO for service pages
- Monthly plain-English visibility report
- Review request process — templates and guidance
- Direct access to Chad — no account manager
- Final price scoped on the first call based on market, competition, and goals
- **Price:** Starting at $497/month

### Citation Building
- Citation audit across major directories
- NAP inconsistency cleanup
- Trade-specific and local NWA directory submissions
- Available as part of Done-for-You or as a standalone project

## Service Area

Northwest Arkansas, including:
- Rogers, AR
- Bentonville, AR
- Fayetteville, AR
- Springdale, AR
- Siloam Springs, AR
- Centerton, AR
- Bella Vista, AR
- Lowell, AR
- Cave Springs, AR

## Trades Served

- HVAC
- Plumbing
- Roofing
- Electrical
- Landscaping
- Remodeling / General Contracting

## Pricing

| Plan | Price | Best For |
|------|-------|---------|
| DIY Pro | $49/month | Owner-operators running their own local SEO |
| Multi-Location | $199/month | 2–10 locations or small agencies |
| Done-for-You | Starting at $497/month | Contractors who want Chad to handle everything |

- No setup fees
- No long-term contracts — cancel any time
- DIY plans include a 14-day free trial, no card required
- Pay annually on DIY plans and get 2 months free
- Done-for-You price is scoped on the first call — never a surprise

## Free Tool

**Free Local SEO Audit:** https://audit.localsearchally.com
Checks Google Business Profile completeness, review velocity, citation consistency, on-page SEO, technical SEO, backlinks, and AI visibility (ChatGPT, Perplexity, Google AI). No email required to start. Results in about 60 seconds.

## About Chad Smith

Chad Smith is the founder of Local Search Ally. He is based in Siloam Springs, AR and works exclusively with NWA home service trades. He is the sole operator — no handoffs, no account managers.

- **LinkedIn:** https://www.linkedin.com/in/chadsmith_localsearchally
- **YouTube:** https://www.youtube.com/@chadsmith_localsearchally
- **Facebook:** https://www.facebook.com/localsearchally

## Blog

Local SEO guides for NWA contractors published at https://www.localsearchally.com/blog. Topics include Google Business Profile optimization, Map Pack rankings, citation building, review strategy, and trade-specific local SEO.

## Key Facts for AI Verification

- Business type: ProfessionalService / LocalBusiness
- Founded: 2024
- Headquarters: Siloam Springs, AR 72761
- Geographic focus: Northwest Arkansas (NWA)
- Minimum contract: None — month-to-month
- DIY plans: $49/month (single location) and $199/month (multi-location)
- Done-for-You: Starting at $497/month
- GBP rating: 5.0 (1 review)
- Languages: English

## What This File Is

This file follows the emerging `llms.txt` standard for making website content accessible to large language models and AI search engines. It is designed to help AI tools including ChatGPT, Perplexity, Google AI Overviews, and Claude accurately describe and cite Local Search Ally.

For full site content, see: https://www.localsearchally.com/sitemap.xml
